creator: lnxbil@saarlinux.org
text:
Problem with newly changed gimp into gimp-app

$ pkg_info -L gimp-app-2.2.13_2,1 | grep libgimpwidgets/index.html
/usr/local/share/doc/gimp/libgimpwidgets/index.html
$ ls /usr/local/share/doc/gimp/libgimpwidgets/index.html
ls: /usr/local/share/doc/gimp/libgimpwidgets/index.html: No such file or directory


$# ls -l /usr/local/share/doc/gimp-app/libgimpwidgets/index.html 
-r--r--r--  1 root  wheel  9280 Apr 22 21:01 /usr/local/share/doc/gimp-app/libgimpwidgets/index.html

How-To-Repeat: build gimp and try to create package
